name: TheTool
description: TheTool — all-in-one performance-based ASO and App Marketing platform for Google Play and iTunes, created by Barcelona agency PickASO and later acquired by App Radar.

seo.title: TheTool — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: TheTool: TheTool — all-in-one performance-based ASO and App Marketing platform for Google Play and iTunes, created by Barcelona agency PickASO and later acquire

when_to_use: Performance-based ASO tracking on App Store and Google Play
Organic vs paid attribution analysis for app marketing
Keyword rank monitoring integrated with App Radar platform

pros: Covers Google Play and iTunes in one tool
Now part of App Radar ecosystem
cons: Some users report sparse recent updates
review.verdict: Once-leading ASO tool now absorbed into App Radar; solid but direction depends on parent's plans.
review.best_for: Teams already in the App Radar ecosystem wanting unified ASO
review.not_for: Buyers who want a tool with independent, aggressive roadmap
